$comment: The canonical policy-gate + TraceEvent contract, owned by governed-agents (lib/governance.ts, lib/trace-events.ts). cason-heritage runs a faithful, dependency-free port in ui_kits/living-line/governance.js; gate-contract.selftest.js verifies that port against THIS fixture so 'faithful' is checked, not hoped. The RULES differ by domain and are not part of the contract — only the decision algebra, the severity model, and the trace wire format are.
precedence: a block-severity violation wins; else a review-severity violation routes to needs_approval; else allow

decisionAlgebra.name: order does not matter (block beats review)
many reviews still only need approval
a violation with no severity defaults to block
